User.title: User
User.description: Minecraft store user profile registration information

uid.description: The unique user ID from Firebase Auth

Rank.title: Rank
Rank.description: A purchasable premium rank in OGzz MC

name.description: The name of the server rank

priceRS.description: Optional manual override price in Indian Rupees (RS)

imageUrl.description: Visual rank badge or emblem URL

inventoryScreenshot.description: Screenshot showing in-game rank perks or visual reference

description.description: Detailed bullet points of the rank's benefits

isPinned.description: Flag to display this item as pinned in the featured section on the home page

name.description: The title of the coin bundle

coinAmount.description: Amount of virtual server coins included

price.description: The price of the coin pack

priceRS.description: Optional manual override price in Indian Rupees (RS)

description.description: Brief highlight list of the pack contents

isPinned.description: Flag to display this item as pinned in the featured section on the home page

Order.title: Order
Order.description: An order logged by the user for rank or coins purchases

orderId.description: A unique ticket ID formatted like OGZZ-XXXXXX

uid.description: User ID of the placing customer

minecraftUsername.description: The Minecraft in-game username of the consumer receiving the items

productName.description: The precise title of the item purchased

price.description: The cost paid for the receipt

priceRS.description: Optional manual override price in Indian Rupees (RS)

status.description: The verification status of the purchase

rejectionReason.description: Explains why the purchase request was denied

Admin.title: Admin
Admin.description: Privileged staff account identifier to log into dashboard panel

role.description: Staff role description such as Admin or Owner

UsernameMapping.title: Username Mapping
UsernameMapping.description: Minecraft character name to user profile mapping index

uid.description: The unique user ID from Firebase Auth

SiteSettings.title: Site Settings
SiteSettings.description: Global custom configurations for website Home IP, Discord server links, Hero Background image link, and custom logo link

serverIP.description: Minecraft server IP address shown on the website

discordLink.description: Discord guild link shown on the website

backgroundImage.description: Custom HTTPS URL of background image displayed on the main hero banner

logoUrl.description: Custom HTTPS URL of the website logo shown in the Navbar and Loader

Bundle.title: Bundle Combo Pack
Bundle.description: A purchasable combo pack containing lifetime rank privileges and virtual server coins

name.description: The title of the bundle package

price.description: The price of the bundle package

priceRS.description: Optional manual override price in Indian Rupees (RS)

imageUrl.description: The custom image URL representing the combo offer

description.description: Brief tagline or copy description of the combo perks

rankName.description: Name of the target rank being unlocked

coinAmount.description: Amount of virtual server coins included in the combo pack

isPinned.description: Flag to display this item as pinned in the featured section on the home page

users/{userId}.description: Users tracking profiles matching registered IDs

ranks/{rankId}.description: The store configurations for ranks item offers

coins/{coinId}.description: The store configurations for coins virtual balance packs

bundles/{bundleId}.description: The store configurations for combo rank and coin purchase bundles

orders/{orderId}.description: All receipts generated by users awaiting Discord verification

admins/{adminId}.description: Security lookup mapping uid to their staff role permissions

usernames/{username}.description: Index mapping lowercased Minecraft username to email and UID for secure lookup

settings/{settingId}.description: Customizable homepage IP and Discord link configurations saved by administrators
